text:
The Female Titan is one of the Titans that appear in and attacks the .

Story

As shoots the Armored Titan, asks if he copied the information sent by . Iron Man confirms as he joins the , who is fighting the Female Titan. Iron Man defeats the Female Titan by firing his energy repulsors into its nape.

Trivia

The Female Titan shows no signs of the intelligence, special abilities, or fighting techniques characteristic of its original manga counterpart, and seems to be mindless.
